name: Tips
recipeInstructions:
1. To quickly thaw frozen vegetables, place them in a colander or strainer; rinse well with warm water until thawed. Drain thoroughly.
2. To dice an onion:
- Slice off the top of the onion and peel off the outer skin.
- Make cuts across the top of the onion, about 1/4 inch deep and spaced approximately 1/2 inch apart in one direction.
- Repeat the cuts in the opposite direction to create small squares.
- Cut slices across the flat side of the onion to create diced onions. Repeat as needed for the desired amount.
3. Freeze ahead:
- Buy extra green, red, and yellow peppers when they are on sale or during special promotions.
- Wash the peppers thoroughly.
- Chop or cut them into strips and store in small portions for quick and easy use in recipes.
